rate.source: americanexpress.com/in official pages (multiple, consistent), retrieved 2026-07-20 (1 Membership Rewards Point per INR 50; India-issued Platinum Travel — distinct from Platinum Charge 1/40, Gold, Platinum Reserve, MR Card, SmartEarn: never merge data across these products)

multiplier.source: americanexpress.com/in/benefits/rewards-program/terms-conditions.html (official Reward Multiplier T&C), retrieved 2026-07-20 (3X total = 1X base + 2X bonus per INR 50, only via the Reward Multiplier portal at eligible merchants; not on direct merchant sites)

monthly_cap_points.source: americanexpress.com/in/benefits/rewards-program/terms-conditions.html (official Reward Multiplier T&C), retrieved 2026-07-20 (25,000 BONUS MR points/month — bonus portion only; base 1X uncapped. Engine approximation clips total accelerated points at this ceiling, conservative above ~INR 6.25L/month portal spend)

accelerated.notes: Program validity 2021-01-01 to 2026-07-31, enforced by the evaluator since ADR-012 — end date approaching, renewal unconfirmed (flagged in VERIFICATION_QUEUE). Crediting within 120 business days (hotel/airline: 120 days from service date). Per-merchant exclusions (mobiles, jewellery, large appliances, gift cards, etc.) are out of MVP scope — documented limitation, not a gap.

cap_points.source: americanexpress.com/in/benefits/rewards-program/terms-conditions.html (official Reward Multiplier T&C), retrieved 2026-07-20 (bonus-portion monthly cap)

caps.notes: Bonus 2X portion only; base 1X earn is uncapped and separate

milestones.notes: Recurring each cardmembership year; redeemable on the Platinum Travel Collection. Operational: bonus portion auto-issued only for milestones achieved after 2026-03-09, earlier achievements require manual claim via call/chat.
Plus a Taj Experiences E-Gift Card worth INR 10,000 (non-point benefit). Recurring yearly; Platinum Travel Collection; same operational auto-issue flag (post-2026-03-09).
Additional 22,500 bonus MR points; recurring yearly; Platinum Travel Collection; same operational auto-issue flag.

cashback.source: 2 independent India-specific sources agreeing; general Amex India 'Select & Redeem — Cover Your Card Charges' statement-credit rate (channel mapping: statement credit -> cashback)

rate_per_point_inr.source: Official americanexpress.com/in/benefits/platinum-travel-credit-card/ catalogue page (exact figures), retrieved 2026-07-20 (20,000 pts = INR 6,000 or 40,000 pts = INR 12,000)

redemption_catalogue.notes: Platinum Travel Collection; card-specific preferential rate above the general 0.25 statement-credit rate

rate_per_point_inr.source: Official americanexpress.com/in/benefits/platinum-travel-credit-card/ catalogue page (exact figures), retrieved 2026-07-20 (12,500 pts = INR 5,000 or 25,000 pts = INR 10,000)
Official americanexpress.com/in/benefits/platinum-travel-credit-card/ catalogue page (exact figures), retrieved 2026-07-20 (20,000 pts = INR 10,000)

points_expiry.notes: Verified 0.95, official: points never expire while the card is active and in good standing; forfeited within 30 days upon cancellation

annual_fee_inr.source: americanexpress.com/in official pages (multiple, consistent), retrieved 2026-07-20 (INR 5,000 + GST; same first year and second-year-onward, no separate joining/renewal split)

forex_markup_pct.source: 3 independent trackers plus a cardholder-reported real transaction rate, all converging (3.5% + GST, approx 4.4-4.5% effective; uniform across Amex India cards)

fees.notes: Annual fee INR 5,000 + GST. NO official spend-based renewal fee waiver exists (verified 2026-07-20, confidence 0.8: CardInsider, Paisabazaar, and CardMaven explicitly stating this in near-identical language). Informal customer-retention offers exist case-by-case (discretionary partial waiver or points-for-fee trade near renewal) but are not published policy and are not modeled. A spend-based waiver existed historically (~2018, INR 15L threshold) but was discontinued.

welcome_bonus.notes: First cardmembership year only. Requires BOTH INR 15,000 spend within 90 days AND annual fee payment.
